title: Is Dynamic Group By still on the Roadmap?
excerpt: I loved the Dynamic Group By that was briefly released and then removed. I just wanted to know if there are any plans to bring that back. Thanks!

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: I loved the Dynamic Group By that was briefly released and then removed. I just wanted to know if there are any plans to bring that back. Thanks!
